properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 89/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 RAMFORM VANGUARD / LANM8 IS CONDUCTING A SEISMIC SURVEY IN AN AREA BOUNDED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES:
 A.71-12.3N 020-33.2E
 B.71-52.2N 020-32.2E
 C.71-52.2N 021-31.1E
 D.71-12.3N 021-30.0E
 E.71-12.3N 020-33.2E
 VESSEL IS TOWING 12 X 4050 METERS LONG CABLES WITH ENDS MARKED V-AIS AND YELLOW BUOYS.
 REQUEST A WIDE BERTH OF ALL PASSING 6NM ASTERN, 3NM PORT AND STARBOARD AND AHEAD.
 SUPPORT VESSELS IN ATTENDANCE ARE M/V RIG ANDROMEDA AND M/V SANCO SEA.VESSELS CAN BE CONTACTED ON VHF 16 AND VHF 69.
